eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Churchill; Clark; Douglas; Elko; Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City, NV; at 2:19 PM on SEP 25, 2019 Effective until 3:19 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the State of Nevada Department of Public Safety Emergency Operations Center with the SEPTEMBER TEST of the Nevada Statewide Emergency Alert System. Broadcasters cable operators and the National Weather Service have set up the E-A-S as a way to keep you informed in the event of an emergency or disaster. As National Preparedness Month wraps up it is time to shift our attention to Cyber Security Awareness Month. Take proactive steps to ensure online safety at home, in the workplace and in public. Be Cyber Smart - Own It. Secure It. Protect It. This concludes todays STATEWIDE test of the NEVADA Emergency Alert System.
